title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.710 - Duties of county clerk to be performed by the register
text:
82.710.  Duties of county clerk to be performed by the register. — All laws providing for the performance of any duty, service or trust, by any county clerk, shall apply to the register of the city of St.  Louis, as if such officer was specially named in such law, acts, or parts of acts.
(RSMo 1939 § 15746) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14798
